issues.claim: Reproducible in code or org practice (not pure metaphor)
issues.objection: Reproducibility check for 7.24: the implication field gives a concrete next-action a team could perform within a quarter. The concrete_scenario references specific tooling (Postgres / Kafka / GitHub / Datadog / Jaeger / Redis / GCP / etc., depending on verse) and specific role-shapes; the falsifiability field forecloses the soft reading. The verse is not pure metaphor; it is reproducible at engineering practice scope. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims metaphysical concealment (avyaktaṁ vyaktim āpannaṁ mistaken). Engineering analog scoped narrowly: architecture diagrams are partial; the substrate carried by the senior is not directly diagrammable. Counter-example: stale tacit assumption is not the verse's paraṁ bhāvam.

notes: Reproducibility check for 7.24: implication is testable in practice. PASS.
